title: External scanner support and initial scanner ports
description:
Integrate the ExternalScanner interface into the parser/lexer and port scanners for Go and JavaScript grammars.

Deliverables:
- ExternalScanner interface integrated into parser: call Scan when external tokens are valid, Serialize after successful external tokens, Deserialize before external scan attempts.
- External scanner state on subtrees: externalScannerState []byte field, short_data optimization ([24]byte inline for states <= 24 bytes matching C behavior).
- ExternalScannerFactory on Language struct, scanner lifecycle management on Parser.
- Lexer extensions for external scanner interaction: valid_symbols []bool passed to Scan.
- Hand-port Go grammar external scanner to Go (handles raw strings, etc).
- Hand-port JavaScript grammar external scanner to Go (template literals, regex, JSX, automatic semicolons).

Tests:
- Parse Go files exercising external scanner tokens (raw string literals, etc)
- Parse JavaScript files with template literals, regex literals, JSX
- External scanner state serialization/deserialization roundtrip
- Incremental-safe: scanner state correctly restored when revisiting tokens

Reference: docs/design.md §4, C source: parser.c (ts_parser__external_scanner_scan/serialize/deserialize)
